"'''Bonnie Piesse: Micro Beru'''" is an interview with [[Bonnie Maree Piesse]] about her part as [[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Whitesun]], and her other roles and interests. It was conducted by [[Scott Chernoff]] and published in [[Star Wars Insider 58|''Star Wars Insider'' 58]].
